default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Superhuman's acquisition by Grammarly, upcoming rebrand, and implications for content strategy and SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Grammarly rebranding to Superhuman (parent company) in October; Superhuman email becomes "Superhuman Mail"](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Content focus remains on Superhuman Mail for now; potential for broader AI productivity content later](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Need to update existing content with new branding/links; opportunity to prune low-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Blog staying at blog.superhuman.com; minimal SEO impact expected](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

## Topics

### Acquisition and Rebrand Overview

  - [Grammarly rebranding to Superhuman (parent company) in October](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Superhuman email product becoming "Superhuman Mail"](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [New bundled offering: Grammarly, Coda, Superhuman Mail, and new product "Go"](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)
  - [Website changes: superhuman.com/product/mail for Superhuman Mail homepage](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
  - [Short-term focus: maintain individual product funnels while experimenting with bundle](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=832.0)

### Content Strategy Implications

  - [Continue focusing on Superhuman Mail content for now](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Potential future expansion to broader AI productivity topics](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1399.0)
  - [Need to update existing content:](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [Add "Mail" to Superhuman mentions](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
      - [Update internal links to new URL structure](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1467.0)
  - [Opportunity to prune low-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Blog staying at blog.superhuman.com (minimal SEO impact)](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)

### SEO and Traffic Considerations

  - [Goal: Maintain clear funnel for original Superhuman (now Mail) users](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Shift paid ad traffic to new /product/mail URLs](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [Audit top-performing blog posts (shared spreadsheet with visitor/conversion data)](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1758.0)
  - [Consider user flow analysis for internal linking optimization](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1854.0)

### Product Integration

  - [Limited integration at launch (mostly pricing bundle)](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1268.0)
  - [Future roadmap (6-12 months) for deeper product integrations](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [New "Go" product: orchestrator for AI agents](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)

### Content Audit and Update Process

  - [Can draft changes now, publish on rebrand date (Oct 29)](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)
  - [Bethany to provide list of URL changes next week](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [Two-tier approach:](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=2078.0)
    1.  Performance audit and content updates
    2.  Detailed link/branding changes

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule follow-up meeting (Monday or Friday next week)](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1921.0)
  - [Begin content audit, focusing on high-performing posts](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)
  - [Continue regular content production](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=2131.0)
  - [Bethany to share URL change list and GA access for user flow analysis](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1881.0)
  - [Explore scheduling broader strategy discussion with Harmony and Grammarly team](https://fathom.video/share/LYLMsk1kLAwTvH6yz7X4e8en1y8vX9mE?tab=summary&timestamp=1471.0)

action_items.description: Schedule new regular meeting time for Superhuman/GrowthX sync
Conduct content audit of Superhuman blog, prioritizing high-traffic/conversion posts
Begin drafting content updates for Superhuman blog, incorporating "mail" mentions, keep in draft mode
Schedule follow-up meeting for Mon/Fri next week, include Harmony if possible
Provide list of Superhuman URL changes in shared sheet, incl. which URLs remain unchanged
